results.title: Basilan’s second most wanted nabbed
results.description: ZAMBOANGA CITY – Authorities arrested a man tagged as the second most wanted person in Basilan during a law enforcement operation in Lamitan City, Basilan on Saturday, June 13. The suspect – Mahdi Alabain Amansa, 30, a resident of Barangay Parangbasak, Lamitan City – was apprehended on a warrant for murder by a Basilan court. No bail was recommended for his release. Recovered from the suspect were several high-powered firearms, including an M16 Armalite rifle with six bullets. Amansa is also facing charges for violating Republic Act 10592, the Comprehensive Firearms and Ammunition Regulation Act. The suspect is under the custody of the Lamitan City police station.

results.title: Curapod review: A promising pain relief device if you stick with it
results.description: Curapod, a wearable pain management device using red and near-infrared light therapy, offers a medication-free solution for joint and muscle pain. While not providing instant relief, consistent use over several weeks showed gradual improvement in discomfort and stiffness, making it a long-term wellness tool.
